title: Team directory
searchPlaceholder: Search by name, ID, or designation…
deleteConfirm: Delete this user account? This cannot be undone.
exportFilteredHint: Export will include only {{count}} selected department(s).
cannotEditAdmin: Only an Administrator can edit or remove Administrator accounts.
cannotAssignAdmin: HR Assistants cannot create or promote to Administrator.
staffAccountCreated: {{name}} created as {{role}}. No clock/REP link — DMPREP checklist skipped.

roleHints.MANAGEMENT: Board / partner — no punch. To administer RH in the app, use Administrator.
roleHints.MANAGER: Team manager — punches and approves team.
roleHints.EMPLOYEE: CLT employee — punches on the clock.

employeeIdPisHint: Use the 12-digit PIS (e.g. 026740847000) — must match DMPREP/clock registration.

dmprepChecklist.subtitle: Employee: {{name}}
dmprepChecklist.warning: HR registers and exports to DIMEP.MDB — no need to re-register in DMP REP software. Biometrics are enrolled directly on the PrintPoint SmartPoint B clock (function 91).
dmprepChecklist.pullFromDmprepHint: Only to sync employees already in DMPREP. Does not replace HR-first admission.
dmprepChecklist.syncFailed: Failed to pull employees from DMPREP.
dmprepChecklist.dmprepHostHint: PrintPoint SmartPoint B — biometrics on device

step2.title: Export to DMPREP
step2.detail: Use Send to DMPREP in the employee panel. Writes to DIMEP.MDB (DMP REP closed during export). Do not re-register in DMP REP.

step3.title: Enroll biometrics on clock
step3.detail: On PrintPoint SmartPoint B: F1 → 91 → supervisor → credential {{employeeId}} → 2 fingers (2 reads each). Manual §3.5.

step4.title: Validate punches in HR
step4.detail: After the first punch, status becomes Ready. Automatic collection ~1 h or Organization → System → Collect punches.

step1.title: Delete fingerprints on clock (required)
step1.detail: On PrintPoint SmartPoint B: F1 → 92 → supervisor → credential {{employeeId}}. Confirm «Fingerprint deleted successfully». Manual §3.6.

step2.title: Remove record from MDB
step2.detail: Automatic when deleting {{name}} in HR (discharge export). No need to open DMP REP.

step3.title: Collect final punches (optional)
step3.detail: In Organization → System, click Collect punches if pending marks exist.

step4.title: Delete HR account
step4.detail: Only after deleting fingerprints on the clock (step 1), confirm deletion of {{name}} below.

onboarding.editIdentityHint: Email and employee ID/PIS cannot be changed here — contact support if needed.
onboarding.clockAfterSave: After saving, you can push the record to DMPREP and track clock biometrics.

errors.pisInvalid: Invalid PIS/credential — use 11 or 12 numeric digits.
errors.passwordShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.

clockOnboarding.title: Clock integration
clockOnboarding.subtitle: Tracking for {{name}}
clockOnboarding.bioMarked: Biometrics marked — waiting for test punch.
clockOnboarding.stepExportDetail: Record written to DIMEP.MDB — replaces manual DMP REP registration. Keep DMP REP closed during export; do not re-register manually.
clockOnboarding.stepBioDetail: On PrintPoint SmartPoint B: F1 → 91 → supervisor → credential {{pis}} → enroll 2 fingers (2 reads each). Manual §3.5.
clockOnboarding.stepPunchDetail: After the first punch, status becomes Ready automatically.

clockGuide.subtitle: SmartPoint B Manual §3.5 and §3.6 — Eletropasso flow: HR exports record; biometrics on clock.

admission.overview: HR registers the employee and exports to DIMEP.MDB (replaces typing in DMP REP). Then go to the PrintPoint SmartPoint B and enroll biometrics using the credential/PIS — no REP Operations needed.

step1.title: Register in HR
step1.detail: Enter the 12-digit PIS (e.g. {{pis}}). This number is the credential on the clock.

step2.title: Export to DMPREP
step2.detail: Click Send to DMPREP. Writes name, PIS, and credential to DIMEP.MDB (PC .69). DMP REP must be closed during export.

step3.title: Enroll biometrics on clock
step3.detail: On PrintPoint SmartPoint B, function 91 (Manual §3.5): supervisor → credential {{pis}} → enroll 2 fingers (2 reads each on Smart B).

step4.title: Validate punch in HR
step4.detail: After the first punch, status becomes Ready automatically. Automatic collection ~1 h or Organization → System → Collect punches.

discharge.overview: On offboarding, delete fingerprints on the clock first (function 92). Deleting in HR removes the MDB record but does not erase biometrics from the device.

step1.title: Delete fingerprints on clock (required)
step1.detail: PrintPoint SmartPoint B, function 92 (Manual §3.6): supervisor → credential {{employeeId}} for {{name}}. Wait for «Fingerprint deleted successfully».

step2.title: Remove record from MDB
step2.detail: Automatic when deleting {{name}} in HR (discharge export). No need to open DMP REP.

step3.title: Collect final punches (optional)
step3.detail: Organization → System → Collect punches if pending marks exist.

step4.title: Delete HR account
step4.detail: Only after deleting fingerprints on the clock (step 1), confirm deletion of {{name}}.

manual.admissionSteps: F1 → type 91 → E → supervisor PIS/password → E → password → E → enter credential {{pis}} → E → select 1st finger → E → place finger 2 times → repeat for 2nd finger.
manual.dischargeSteps: F1 → type 92 → E → supervisor PIS/password → E → password → E → enter credential {{pis}} → E → confirm «Fingerprint deleted successfully».
manual.modelNote: SmartPoint B (Secukey): 2 reads per finger, up to 2 fingerprints per employee.

warnings.pisMatch: PIS/credential must be identical in HR, DIMEP.MDB, and on the clock.
warnings.bioOnClock: Biometrics are enrolled and deleted only on the physical clock (functions 91 and 92) — not via DMP REP software.
warnings.noDmprepRecadastro: After successful export, do not manually re-register the employee in DMP REP.
warnings.noAutoOffboard: Deleting in HR does not remove biometrics from the clock — use function 92 before deleting the account.

pis.definition: 12-digit identifier in HR. Same number used on the clock to enroll or delete fingerprints.

nsr.definition: Sequential Record Number — each clock operation (fingerprint add/delete) generates an NSR in device memory.

credential.definition: Employee code on the clock (= PIS). Entered on PrintPoint keypad when enrolling biometrics.

dmprep.definition: Master record database on PC .69. HR exports to it; no need to re-register in software unless export fails.

printpoint.definition: Secukey biometric clock at 192.168.15.201. Admission: function 91. Offboarding: function 92. Punches collected automatically by HR server.
